title: High Costs Ail Avery Dennison (AVY) Despite Strategic Actions
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) faces headwinds from elevated costs and supply-chain issues.

title: 9 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: All these stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 6.7% and a median increase of 7.1%. There are nine increases for next week, down from eleven last week.
